items.name: Chibi Female Bundle (2D)
items.description:
A chibi bundle that supports both 2D and 3D clothing the character is small like the other mini bundles made by other UGC creators. The head can be replaced to use the mini body. Buy the heads that go along with it here: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=4&Subcategory=66&CreatorName=Azaph3D&salesTypeFilter=1 

The character was created by https://www.roblox.com/users/18618614/profile , who worked on the entire bundle. The cage for 3D clothing was created by Azaph3D
